allow: Bash(python -c "import kivy; print\(kivy.__version__\); import kivy.core.window; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(kivy.core.window.WindowBase._dispatch_input\); print\(src\)")
Bash(python -c "import kivy.input.motionevent; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(kivy.input.motionevent.MotionEvent.grab\); print\(src\)")
Bash(python -c " import kivy.core.window as w print\([m for m in dir\(w.WindowBase\) if 'dispatch' in m.lower\(\) or 'touch' in m.lower\(\)]\) ")
Bash(python -c " from kivy.uix.modalview import ModalView import inspect print\(inspect.getsource\(ModalView.open\)\) print\('---'\) print\(inspect.getsource\(ModalView.dismiss\)\) ")
